text:
In the first image, surrounded by emptiness and the sterile promise of an unused room, I feel a quiet anticipation mingled with slight unease. The precise order of the chairs and the cold functionality of the space are almost intimidating, as if awaiting a gathering that may never come. The fire hose and exit sign remind me of safety, but also of preparedness for unforeseen emergencies—an existential signal that life is both planned and uncertain.

In the second image, I am immersed in a curated world of ideas, where words and objects are arranged for contemplation. The juxtaposition of "R+D" and reflective texts provokes in me a sense of curiosity and self-examination. Here, the boundaries between knowledge and emotion, intention and perception, are blurred. I am comforted by the creative chaos yet also feel exposed by the intellectual scrutiny, as if my inner questions echo back at me through the brightly colored displays. In this space, I am both a participant and an observer, alive to the possibilities of discovery and self-realization.
